response.step_by_step_log: Identified song as 'VAVAVA! バーチャル大分' by Shirogane Noel, composed by Kenmochi Hidefumi. Performed a search for 'VAVAVA! バーチャル大分 歌詞' to retrieve lyrics. The video is a single performance, so it is mapped as one scene. Lyrics were extracted from reliable Japanese lyric sites and summarized in English.
response.global_summary: A continuous performance of the song "VAVAVA! バーチャル大分" (VAVAVA! Virtual Oita) by Hololive VTuber Shirogane Noel, presented as part of her birthday celebration event.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs 'VAVAVA! バーチャル大分' on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
説明しよう。バーチャル大分とは、
バーチャル九州の北東部に位置する広大な大地。
現実の大分県に限りなく近い、地上の楽園。
人はその地を、バーチャル大分と呼ぶ!
ババババーチャル大分世に放つ
バババ バーチャル大分食べつくす
バーチャル大分!
君と バーチャル大分駆け巡る
バババ バーチャル大分大分 どーん!
(Lyrics continue...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Let me explain. Virtual Oita is a vast land located in the northeast of Virtual Kyushu. It is a terrestrial paradise that is as close as possible to the real Oita Prefecture. People call that land Virtual Oita! Ba-Ba-Ba, Virtual Oita, released to the world. Ba-Ba-Ba, Virtual Oita, eat it all up. Virtual Oita, I will tell you, together with you, Virtual Oita, I will run around. Ba-Ba-Ba, Virtual Oita, Oita, Boom! ... (Lyrics continue with various Oita specialties and landmarks)
